title: 向けられる想いと戸惑い

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming shopping with me today.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It was very helpful getting to hear your opinion as
a fellow trainer, especially since...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: That's Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse over there.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What are they doing out so late?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Bitter Glasse... Are you here for the same reason?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Looks like it! Great minds think alike!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Yes, but... I haven't figured out what to get yet.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Heh! I'm sure we'll find something once we get to
the store!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What are they getting? And where?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but they also appear excited about
something.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
choice_data_list: You don't want to say anything?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes. I should have approached them before
they left.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...In any case, let's follow them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The sun's gone down already. It's not safe for
them to be out unchaperoned.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
What about this cake? Looks like it'll really hit
the spot!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: It's huge! There's no way Trainer Kashimoto would be able to finish all that!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: We can just help her out if she can't!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
That would defeat the purpose... This is supposed
to be for her, not for us.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Let's give it some more thought. I want to get her
something she'll really like.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
For sure! I wanna thank her for always putting us
first!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
We gotta make sure it comes from the heart to
really make her happy!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: They're getting something... for me?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: We need to hurry back.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If they bring the gift over immediately, I won't be
there to receive it.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: We have to get back before that happens! Run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after we start sprinting, she runs out of
breath, and I have to help her all the way back.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... I-I need to catch my breath... to appear calm and composed...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Inhale and... exhale.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...I can't believe they wanted to surprise me with a
gift.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I keep telling them not to worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Really... What am I supposed to do with those
two?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later, I ask how things went that night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She only says that their gift was delicious, but I
can easily tell how grateful she feels to her racers.
